include_directories(${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/include)
include_directories(${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/include)
add_subdirectory(include)
# Resolve LLD early: when building the Python module and LLD is not found we build only the
# AMD stub plugin and must not add amd/lib (so TritonAMDGPUIR etc. are not registered).
# Root may set TRITON_AMD_LLD_FOUND before adding this subdir.
if(TRITON_BUILD_PYTHON_MODULE AND NOT DEFINED TRITON_AMD_LLD_FOUND)
  find_package(LLD CONFIG PATHS "${LLD_DIR}" NO_DEFAULT_PATH)
  if(LLD_FOUND)
    set(TRITON_AMD_LLD_FOUND TRUE PARENT_SCOPE)
  endif()
endif()
if(TRITON_AMD_LLD_FOUND OR (LLD_FOUND OR NOT TRITON_BUILD_PYTHON_MODULE))
  add_subdirectory(lib)
endif()
if(TRITON_BUILD_PYTHON_MODULE)
  # Full AMD plugin (triton_amd.cc) needs LLD and backend hipblas-common header; otherwise use stub.
  set(AMD_FULL_PLUGIN FALSE)
  if(LLD_FOUND)
    set(AMD_HIPBLAS_COMMON_H "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/backend/include/hipblas-common/hipblas-common.h")
    if(EXISTS "${AMD_HIPBLAS_COMMON_H}")
      set(AMD_FULL_PLUGIN TRUE)
    else()
      message(STATUS "AMD backend hipblas-common.h not found; building AMD Python plugin as stub")
    endif()
  endif()
  if(AMD_FULL_PLUGIN)
    include_directories(${LLD_INCLUDE_DIRS})
    message(STATUS "Found LLD distro-package @ ${LLD_DIR} and LLD include dirs @ ${LLD_INCLUDE_DIRS}")
    add_triton_plugin(TritonAMD ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/python/triton_amd.cc LINK_LIBS TritonAMDGPUToLLVM TritonAMDGPUTransforms TritonAMDGPUDialectToLLVM)
    target_link_libraries(TritonAMD PRIVATE Python3::Module nanobind-static lldCommon lldELF)
  else()
    if(NOT LLD_FOUND)
      message(STATUS "LLD not found; building Triton AMD Python plugin as stub (init_triton_amd only)")
    endif()
    add_triton_plugin(TritonAMD ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/python/triton_amd_stub.cc)
    target_link_libraries(TritonAMD PRIVATE Python3::Module pybind11::headers)
  endif()
endif()
add_subdirectory(test)
